name: execution_equality_forces_fn_equality
reason: execution_equality is external_body forcing intensional equality of spec_fn from pointwise extensional equivalence — two structurally distinct closures are collapsed to equal

name: implies_apply_closure_bridge
reason: implies_apply is external_body bridging p.implies(q).satisfied_by(ex) through TempPred::new closure wrapping and direct implication — silently resolves closure identity mismatch

name: suffix_zero_equals_self
reason: ex.suffix(0) creates closure |i| f(i+0) intensionally distinct from ex — execution_equality silently equates these without proof

name: eliminate_always_reflexive
reason: eliminate_always derives spec.entails(p) from spec.entails(always(p)) for any spec — combined with the trivial always(p).entails(always(p)), it strips temporal modality with only external_body axioms as justification

name: suffix_composition_equals_addition
reason: doubly-nested suffix creates a closure intensionally distinct from single-offset suffix — execution_equality collapses them without proof
